title: thelypteris noveboracensis f. fragrans
intro: Thelypteris noveboracensis f. fragrans, also known as the Fragrant Lady Fern, is a fern species native to North America, characterized by its distinctive fragrance and dark green fronds. The medicinal properties of Thelypteris noveboracensis f. fragrans include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory congestion. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris noveboracensis f. fragrans can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
